lint.command: echo "Checkstyle remains advisory in this review mission; treat the existing baseline as known debt and capture findings in docs/code-review/test-ci-governance.md."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a docs-only review feature adds a new required artifact under `docs/code-review/` after synthesis/index files already exist, require the worker to refresh `docs/code-review/README.md` (and any related index files) in the same change so VAL-CROSS-001 stays true on milestone HEAD.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-1 scrutiny failed because commit `489da9c3736dd36ea6091fdc12c4bfcea7e1c443` added only `docs/code-review/remediation-backlog.md`; fix commit `6657832bd3b599cf4702c9850d7ada5351bce9bb` had to repair `docs/code-review/README.md` separately by adding the backlog link, removing stale pending-artifact language, and recording governance-review scrutiny status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a first-class manual fallback for reviewer fan-out failures: if `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents cannot launch because of model alias/runtime issues, inspect the handoffs, transcript skeletons, and diffs directly, then author the per-feature review JSON files in-session before continuing synthesis.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun again attempted Task-based review fan-out and failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so governance-review scrutiny still required direct in-session review authoring for `governance-review-index-sync-fix`.
